summary: Milestones Tab | Hearing Announcement When Navigating to Inning Navigation in Milestones
description:
GIVEN the user is in the Milestones tab
AND TTS is enabled

steps.action: WHEN the user navigates down from the Milestones tab and focuses on the right arrow key
steps.result: THEN the user will hear: “In the Inning navigation, press down to view milestones in <Insert inning displayed> inning, press right arrow key to view milestones in the next inning”
